title: Method for recycling substrate process components
abstract: A method for recycling a substrate process component of a processing chamber is provided. In one example, the recycling process includes retrieving a reference dimension for the substrate process component. The substrate process component includes a side wall having a bottom surface, an outer surface, a pre-defined wall thickness between the bottom surface and the outer surface, and a residue layer. The reference dimension corresponds to the pre-defined wall thickness. The recycling process includes machining the substrate process component with a mechanical cutting tool. The machining includes securing the substrate process component to a work piece holder and passing the mechanical cutting tool across the outer surface in a machining operation controlled by a controller to remove the residue layer. The controller uses the reference dimension to control the machining operation so that the substrate process component has the reference dimension after removal of the residue layer.
claims:
Claims Claims: 1 . A process for recycling a substrate process component of a processing chamber, comprising: retrieving a reference dimension for the substrate process component, wherein the substrate process component comprises a side wall having a bottom surface, an outer surface, a pre-defined wall thickness between the bottom surface and the outer surface, and a residue layer, and wherein the reference dimension corresponds to the pre-defined wall thickness; machining the substrate process component with a mechanical cutting tool to remove the residue layer, wherein the machining comprises: securing the substrate process component to a work piece holder; and passing the mechanical cutting tool across the outer surface in a machining operation controlled by a controller to remove the residue layer, wherein the controller uses the reference dimension to control the machining operation, and wherein the substrate process component has the reference dimension after removal of the residue layer. 2. The process for recycling the substrate process component of claim 1 , further comprising: storing a recycle iteration number in the controller to identify a number of times that the substrate process component has been recycled; and using the recycle iteration number in the controller to control the machining operation to remove the residue layer. 3. The process for recycling the substrate process component of claim 2, further comprising: 

 determining a compensation factor for the side wall corresponding to a decrease in the side wall during a recycling of the substrate process component; performing a plurality of recycle iterations on the substrate process component including a first recycle iteration and a second recycle iteration; using the reference dimension for the first recycle iteration to control the machining operation to remove the residue layer; using the reference dimension with the compensation factor for the second recycle iteration to control the machining operation to remove the residue layer. 4. The process for recycling the substrate process component of claim 1 , wherein the substrate process component comprises a coating layer on the outer surface, wherein the machining removes at least a portion of the coating layer, and wherein the process for recycling the substrate process component further comprises applying a recycle coating layer on the outer surface after machining. 5. A process for recycling a substrate process component of a processing chamber, comprising: retrieving a first reference dimension for the substrate process component in a first component region, wherein the substrate process component comprises a side wall having bottom surface, an outer surface, a first pre-defined wall thickness between the bottom surface and the outer surface in the first component region, and a residue layer disposed above the outer surface, and wherein the first reference dimension corresponds to the first pre-defined wall thickness; machining the substrate process component with a mechanical cutting tool to remove the residue layer in the first component region from the outer surface, wherein the machining comprises: 

 securing the substrate process component to a work piece holder; and passing the mechanical cutting tool across the outer surface in a machining operation controlled by a controller to remove the residue layer in the first component region, wherein the controller uses the first reference dimension to control the machining operation to remove the residue layer in the first component region, and wherein the side wall has the first reference dimension in the first component region after removal of the residue layer. 6. The process for recycling the substrate process component of claim 5, further comprising: retrieving a second reference dimension for the substrate process component in a second component region, wherein the substrate process component comprises a second pre-defined wall thickness between the bottom surface and the outer surface in a second component region of the outer surface, and wherein the second reference dimension corresponds to the second pre-defined wall thickness; wherein the controller uses the second reference dimension to control the machining operation to remove the residue layer in the second component region, and wherein the side wall has the second reference dimension in the second component region after removal of the residue layer. 7. The process for recycling the substrate process component of claim 5, further comprising: applying a coolant to the substrate process component during the passing of the mechanical cutting tool across the outer surface; cleaning the substrate process component with a cleaning solution; and grit blasting the outer surface after cleaning with the cleaning solution. 8. The process of recycling the substrate process component of claim 5, wherein the substrate process component comprises a coating layer on the outer surface, and wherein the machining removes at least a portion of the coating layer. 9. The process for recycling the substrate process component of claim 8, further comprising: applying a coating layer on the outer surface after machining. 10. A process for recycling a substrate process component of a processing chamber, comprising: retrieving a first reference dimension for the substrate process component in a first component region, wherein the substrate process component comprises a side wall having a bottom surface, an outer surface, a first pre-defined wall thickness between the bottom surface and the outer surface in the first component region, and a first residue layer disposed above the outer surface, and wherein the first reference dimension corresponds to the first pre-defined wall thickness; determining a compensation factor for the side wall corresponding to a decrease in the side wall during a recycle iteration of the substrate process component; machining the substrate process component with a mechanical cutting tool to remove the first residue layer from the outer surface in a recycle operation, wherein the machining comprises: securing the substrate process component to a work piece holder; and passing the mechanical cutting tool across the outer surface in a machining operation controlled by a controller, wherein the controller uses the first reference dimension with the compensation factor in controlling the machining operation to remove the first residue layer in the first component region, and wherein the side wall has the first 

 reference dimension in the first component region after removal of the first residue layer. 1 1 . The process for recycling the substrate process component of claim 10, wherein the first reference dimension comprises a first pre-defined reference tolerance range. 12. The process for recycling the substrate process component of claim 10, further comprising: performing a plurality of recycling processes on the substrate process component, wherein the side wall has the first reference dimension in the first component region after removal of the first residue layer for each of the plurality of recycling processes. 13. The process for recycling the substrate process component of claim 10, wherein the process for recycling the substrate process component comprises a plurality of recycle iterations, wherein the substrate process component comprises an identification marking, wherein the machining operation varies for the plurality of recycle iterations depending on a recycle iteration number for the substrate process component, and wherein the recycle iteration number corresponds to a number of recycle iterations. 14. The process for recycling the substrate process component of claim 10, further comprising: retrieving a second reference dimension for the substrate process component in a second component region, wherein the substrate process component comprises a second pre-defined wall thickness between the bottom surface and the outer surface in the second component region of the outer surface, and wherein the second reference dimension corresponds to the second pre-defined wall thickness; 

 wherein the controller uses the second reference dimension to control the machining operation to remove the residue layer in the second component region, and wherein the side wall has the second reference dimension in the second component region after removal of the residue layer. 15. The process for recycling the substrate process component of claim 14, wherein the first reference dimension comprises a first reference tolerance range for the first component region and a second reference tolerance range for the second component region, and wherein the first reference tolerance range and the second reference tolerance range are different.
